jobs_to_be_done.core_job: [The main high-level task or goal the user is trying to achieve]
jobs_to_be_done.context_trigger: [The situation, event, or condition that prompts the need to get this job done]
emotional_needs: [How the user wants to feel while doing the job or after completing it]
social_needs: [How the user wants to be perceived by others]
jobs_to_be_done.desired_outcome: [The ultimate successful result they are aiming for]
